headline: Stop the weekend snack spiral—work hard today
summary: Today you must eliminate Friday snacking and complete 45 minutes of cardio to close the 0.43 kg/week pace deficit standing between you and 88kg.
details: First: Replace emotional eating with 2–3 Huel meals and water (3+ liters)—remove the trigger environment entirely. Second: Row or run for 45 minutes today at medium intensity; your desk work demands intentional movement. Third: You're 945 days behind schedule, and this Friday is exactly where you typically fail—one disciplined day breaks that pattern and compounds toward your June 2027 deadline.
